headline: Inside ‘Project Eagle,’ JPMorgan’s High-Wire Act to Fund EA Deal
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The post from @realDonaldTrump landed at precisely 7:23 a.m. Inside JPMorgan Chase & Co., the final piece of Project Eagle was a go.For weeks, JPMorgan bankers had anxiously watched events in the Middle East as they worked to sell the financing for the biggest leveraged buyout ever, the $55-billion private equity takeover of video-game giant Electronic Arts Inc. headline: BlackRock's Larry Fink says oil could drop to $40 if the Iran war ends right — or stay near $150 for years
summary: Here's how Fink's best- and worst-case scenarios effect your gas, groceries and 401(k)s.

headline: As stocks and bonds fall, and oil hits $100, a futures trade that boomed in 2022 may again be a winner
summary: Managed futures, which track macro themes expected to play out over months, do well when traditional assets are falling. This could be one of those times.

headline: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink's Pay Jumps To $37.7 Million In 2025 As Managed Assets Hit Record $14 Trillion
summary: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink earned $37.7 million in 2025 after a strong year marked by record $14 trillion AUM and solid earnings.
